# Keen 0.15.0
Joint release with keen-backend 0.15.0.
## Highlights
- **Tier 1 PR 5:** User-held managed-hosting recovery codes (Keychain, post-provision save gate).
- **Editor:** Mermaid ELK routing, error containment, polarity-aware preview.
- **Managed logs:** Client timezone on `createLogEntry` (desktop + backend).
- **Backend:** `search_entities` tool, vector health probes, linked-entities / `search_knowledge` fixes.
Full changelog: [keen-frontend](https://github.com/saputello2/keen-frontend/blob/v0.15.0/CHANGELOG.md#0150---2026-05-25) · [keen-backend](https://github.com/saputello2/keen-backend/blob/v0.15.0/CHANGELOG.md#0150---2026-05-25)
